title: CompKBQA: Component-wise Task Decomposition for Knowledge Base Question Answering
research_areas: T10 Question Answering, Open-domain question answering, closed-domain question answering, extractive and abstractive QA, multi-hop question answering
T13 Knowledge discovery/representation (knowledge graphs, linked data, terminologies, lexicons, ontologies, etc.)
T14 Language Modeling (including training, fine-tuning, representation learning, and generation of synthetic data)
